prestazioni: Full bolt-on hybrid turbo system for the S68B44T4 (4.4L V8 PHEV) utilizing a Garrett GTX5544R Gen II turbocharger with billet compressor wheel (76mm inducer, 106mm exducer) and custom 0.82 A/R turbine housing, paired with a TiAL MV-R 60mm wastegate and TiAL Q 50mm BOV, supporting 950+ HP on E85 with a custom ECU flash by Dimsport Genius Pro

Full titanium exhaust system by Akrapović with 3.5-inch diameter piping, quad 100mm carbon-fiber tips, and a secondary bypass valve for aggressive backpressure tuning, reducing weight by 45% over stock while maintaining TÜV compliance

Custom PHEV-specific cooling package by CSF Racing, including a billet aluminum 4-core radiator with integrated oil cooler, dual 12-row transmission coolers, and a standalone electric water pump system with a Davies Craig EWP150 controller for consistent 180°F coolant temps under track conditions
estetica: Full carbon-fiber widebody conversion by 991 Racing, featuring extended front fenders (35mm per side), rear quarter panels (50mm per side), and a custom rear diffuser with integrated Gurney flap, all finished in matte clear coat with exposed weave

OEM+ aggressive front bumper lip by AC Schnitzer with integrated DRLs and a custom carbon-fiber splitter with adjustable dive planes, paired with a 3D-printed ABS rear spoiler extension (20mm taller than stock) for increased downforce

Forged aluminum 23-inch wheels by HRE (FF16 model) in a staggered setup (10.5x23 ET35 front, 12.5x23 ET40 rear) with custom gold anodized accents, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (295/30 front, 335/25 rear) and paired with AP Racing 6-piston front/4-piston rear calipers with 400mm rotors
